title: aeranthes calceola
intro: Aeranthes calceola, also known as the Monkey Face Orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family, characterized by its unique, long-lasting blooms and delicate fragrance. Traditionally, Aeranthes calceola has been used in herbal medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. In herbal preparations, Aeranthes calceola is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
